name: United Quest℠ Card

welcome_offer.description: 90,000 bonus miles + 3,000 PQP after $4,000 in 3 months + 10,000 miles for adding authorized user in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 4X miles on United tickets purchased directly from United (3 bonus + 1 base mile)
4X miles on seat upgrades, Economy Plus, inflight purchases, and baggage fees from United
4X miles on United Card Events from Chase
2X miles at restaurants including takeout and eligible delivery services
2X miles on travel excluding United purchases

annual_credits.name: United Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $200 statement credit each year for United purchases — offsets most of the $350 AF

annual_credits.name: Award Flight Discount
annual_credits.description: 10,000-mile award flight discount each year when booking United flights with miles

annual_credits.name: Free Checked Bags
annual_credits.description: 2 free checked bags for cardmember and one companion on United (~$60 each way, up to $240 value roundtrip)

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: United Premier Access priority boarding on United flights

other_benefits.name: Free Checked Bags
other_benefits.description: 2 free checked bags for cardmember and companion on United-operated flights

other_benefits.name: PQP Earning
other_benefits.description: Earn PQP toward United Premier status: up to 6,000 PQP per year (1 PQP per $20 spent on general purchases, 1 PQP per $10 spent on United flights), up to 18,000 PQP calendar year max

other_benefits.name: Award Flight Discount
other_benefits.description: 10,000-mile annual discount on award flights booked with miles; save 10-15% vs standard mileage redemptions

notes: AF increased from $250 to $350 in March 2025. The $200 annual United credit alone nearly offsets the AF. Good mid-tier United card for occasional flyers who want checked bags and travel credits without paying $695 for Club access. 4X on United flights is solid. Annual value easily exceeds $350 with credits.
